arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag knows what his players truly feel about him after “disgusting” Tottenham defeat
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag cut a lonely figure on the Old Trafford touchline at the weekend, as his Man United side were battered by Tottenham Hotspur. Former Red Devil, Gary Neville, called the performance “disgusting” and many other things on his Gary Neville podcast, recorded directly after the match when he was clearly still seething at […] The post Erik ten Hag knows what his players truly feel about him after “disgusting” Tottenham defeat appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou may have no option but to repeat Tottenham pre-season experiment vs Ferencvaros
arts.sum: A possible rest for Van de Ven could open the door up for Ben Davies to come in at centre-back after starting in the position in Tottenham's first European game. As was the case last Thursday at home to Qarabag, head coach Ange Postecoglou will likely rotate some of his team with a tough away game at Brighton & Hove Albion coming up on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Erik ten Hag details Sir Jim Ratcliffe conversations after Tottenham loss
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag discussed the conversations he's had with Sir Jim Ratcliffe following the club's embarrassing 3-0 defeat to Tottenham Hotspur at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Major boost for Liverpool and Spurs as transfer target could now push for a move
arts.sum: Liverpool and Tottenham are both chasing Crystal Palace midfielder Eberechi Eze. The England international has attracted the attention of some of the biggest clubs in the country with his fine performances for the Eagles. The midfielder contributed to Palace’s impressive season in 2023-24 by adding eleven goals and registering four assists. arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag urges belief as Man Utd bid to bounce back from Tottenham defeat
arts.sum: United face a Europa League tie away to Porto on Thursday before tackling Aston Villa at Villa Park in the league on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent Spurs message by Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: The Gunners have finished as runners-up in the Premier League to Manchester City in successive seasons and Saka has revealed that there is a hunger in the team to ensure they do not finish up as also-rans again this term. Bukayo Saka has told his Arsenal teammates that they are a team that needs to win something this season and cannot afford to build a reputation for coming up short – like North London rivals Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot aims thinly veiled dig at Man Utd after Tottenham humbling
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a dream start to life at Liverpool after replacing Jurgen Klopp and the Dutchman already appears to be on board with the rivalry with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Tim Sherwood says Tottenham star would have ‘jumped at the chance’ to sign for Manchester United
